notes: Both disagreement entries (tasmād yudhyasva framing; aprameyasya semantic field) carry substantive explanations. The first names how Shankara emphasizes the analytical move (body has been seen to be antavanta, therefore action follows) while Ramanuja emphasizes the svadharma frame (warrior's prescribed duty). The second explains aprameyasya's epistemic vs ontological readings precisely. Both explanations exceed 200 chars and contain real reasoning, not boilerplate. The disagreement-explanations correctly note that BOTH readings explicitly LICENSE action — which is the chapter-thesis-mandated point. PASS.
